name: DAV Alpinzentrum Bielefeld
content: DAV Alpinzentrum Bielefeld is located in Bielefeld-Senne. It is a major climbing gym offering lead climbing walls, top-rope sections, and bouldering facilities.

name: Centre of Gravity
content: Centre of Gravity, formerly known as Climbix, is a prominent bouldering gym located in Bielefeld Mitte. It focuses entirely on indoor bouldering.

name: Blocbuster
content: Blocbuster is a bouldering hall located in Bielefeld-Sudbrack. It is famous for bouldering problems, its cozy bistro, and an on-site sauna.

name: Bäckerei Lamm
content: Bäckerei Lamm is a historic local bakery situated in Bielefeld Altstadt (old town). Established in 1912, it is famous for its traditional Lammbrot.

name: Kesselbrink Radstation
content: Kesselbrink Radstation is located at Kesselbrink square in Bielefeld. It provides bicycle repair services, secure parking, and bike rentals.

name: Lichtwerk Kino
content: Lichtwerk Kino is a popular arthouse cinema situated in the Ravensberger Park in Bielefeld. It screens independent, documentary, and international films.
